text: 18. PERMITS: All permits (except Contractor's main building permit), licenses, tap fees and easements necessary for the prosecution of the sublet work shall be procured and paid for by Subcontractor. Subcontractor shall give all notices and comply with all laws, ordinances, rules and regulations bearing on the conduct of the work as drawn and specified. If Subcontractor observes that plans and  specifications  are  at  variance  with  applicable,  laws,  ordinances,  rules  and  regulations,  or  are  at  variance  with  actual conditions,  he  shall  promptly  notify  Contractor  in  writing,  and  if  Subcontractor  performs  any  work  contrary  to  such  actual conditions, laws, ordinances, rules and regulations without such notice to Contractor, he shall bear all costs arising there from.
